summary: Iteration 306 - Comic Story Book Builder Preview Fix VERIFIED. All fixes confirmed working: (1) Backend preview returns success:true with real presigned R2 URLs OR success:false (never placehold.co), (2) Frontend shows real AI-generated preview images OR honest 'Preview not available' state, (3) No placehold.co URLs anywhere in Comic Story Book Builder code or responses, (4) Gallery/Explore regression check passed (48+ items with thumbnails).
critical_code_review_comments: comic_storybook_v2.py preview endpoint: Lines 191-197 correctly return {success: false, previewPages: [], message: '...'} on failure - NO placehold.co URLs
comic_storybook_v2.py job status endpoint: Lines 1024-1049 presign page_urls for completed jobs - verified working
ComicStorybookBuilder.js: NO placehold.co references in entire file (grep confirmed)
SafeImage.jsx: Line 39 filters out placehold.co URLs with 'const isPlaceholder = src && src.includes('placehold.co')' - acts as safety net
NOTE: placehold.co URLs still exist in StylePreview.jsx, photo_to_comic.py, comix_ai.py, gif_maker.py, comic_storybook.py (legacy) - these are different tools, not Comic Story Book Builder
Preview API successfully generates real AI images (took ~26 seconds) and returns presigned R2 URLs

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Step 5 preview verified with real AI image)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data and live preview API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comic Story Book Builder preview fix verified. Preview API returns real R2 URLs (not placehold.co). SafeImage component filters placehold.co as extra safety. Note: Other tools (StylePreview.jsx, photo_to_comic.py, comix_ai.py, gif_maker.py, comic_storybook.py) still have placehold.co references - these may need separate fixes if they're a problem.

preview_returns_real_urls_or_honest_fail.evidence: POST /api/comic-storybook-v2/preview returns {success: true, previewPages: [{url: 'https://pub-...r2.dev/...'}, ...]} with real R2 presigned URLs. On failure returns {success: false, previewPages: [], message: '...'}

no_placehold_co_in_comic_storybook.evidence: grep -n 'placehold.co' /app/frontend/src/pages/ComicStorybookBuilder.js returns 0 results. SafeImage.jsx filters placehold.co URLs.

step5_preview_shows_real_image.evidence: UI test showed real AI-generated cover image for 'Max's Birthday Adventure' with two cartoon children - not a placehold.co placeholder

job_status_presigns_page_urls.evidence: Backend code lines 1040-1043 presign page_urls: 'for page in job.get("page_urls", []): if page.get("url") and ".r2.dev/" in page["url"]: page["url"] = presign_url(page["url"])'

gallery_regression_check.evidence: GET /api/pipeline/gallery returns 48+ items with thumbnail_url, no placehold.co URLs

explore_regression_check.evidence: GET /api/public/explore returns items with thumbnails, no placehold.co URLs

genres_endpoint.evidence: GET /api/comic-storybook-v2/genres returns 8 genres (kids_adventure, superhero, fantasy, comedy, romance, scifi, mystery, horror_lite)

pricing_endpoint.evidence: GET /api/comic-storybook-v2/pricing returns pricing structure for pages (10/20/30) and add-ons

api_tests_summary.TestComicStorybookPreview: 3/3 passed - preview endpoint exists, returns real URLs or honest failure, no placehold.co on failure
api_tests_summary.TestComicStorybookJobStatus: 2/2 passed - history endpoint works, job status has presigned URLs
api_tests_summary.TestExploreRegressionCheck: 1/1 passed - trending returns items with thumbnails
api_tests_summary.TestGenresAndPricing: 2/2 passed - genres and pricing endpoints work

visual_verification.comic_builder_step1: Step 1 shows 8 genre options (Kids Adventure, Superhero, Fantasy, Comedy, Romance, Sci-Fi, Mystery, Spooky Fun) with Continue button
visual_verification.comic_builder_step5_preview: Step 5 shows 'Generating cover preview...' loading state while preview API is called
visual_verification.comic_builder_step5_final: Step 5 shows real AI-generated cover image for 'Max's Birthday Adventure' with actual illustrated children - NOT placehold.co placeholder

placehold_co_audit.note: Other files may need separate fixes if placehold.co is a problem there
